mapper.select: SELECT id, username, nickname, email, phone, password, role, department_id, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, nickname, email, phone, password, role, department_id, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
